---
title: "Home"
page-layout: full
comments: false
format:
  html:
    toc: false
listing:
  id: recent-posts
  contents:
    - "posts/**/*.qmd"
    - "!posts/**/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  max-items: 3
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  categories: false
---

Welcome to **SheafofThoughts**.

This is a mathematics blog with posts at different levels and on different themes. Below you can find the most recent posts. For the complete list, click “Browse posts” in the upper-left corner of the page, or use the boxes below to browse by category or series.


## Recent posts

::: {#recent-posts}
:::

## Browse by category

::: {.category-grid}

::: {.category-card}
::: {.category-card-top}
Topic
:::
### [Algebraic Geometry](posts.html#category=Algebraic%20Geometry)
:::

::: {.category-card}
::: {.category-card-top}
Topic
:::
### [Number Theory](posts.html#category=Number%20Theory)
:::

::: {.category-card}
::: {.category-card-top}
Level
:::
### [Beginner](posts.html#category=Beginner)
:::

::: {.category-card}
::: {.category-card-top}
Level
:::
### [Intermediate](posts.html#category=Intermediate)
:::

::: {.category-card}
::: {.category-card-top}
Level
:::
### [Advanced](posts.html#category=Advanced)
:::

:::

## Series

::: {.series-grid}
::: {.category-card}
::: {.category-card-top}
Series
:::
### [Fermat’s Christmas Theorem](posts/fermat-christmas-theorem/)

A series of posts aimed at proving Fermat's Christmas Theorem.
:::
:::
